items.title_cn: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
items.title_en: Android 17 launches with new multitasking tools as Google expands Gemini features
items.summary_cn: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.
items.summary_en: Google has released Android 17 and Wear OS 7, introducing new multitasking features, parental controls, security tools, and smartwatch upgrades. The launch is also accompanied by a Pixel Drop that brings Google’s latest AI models to its devices.
